scripts.build:
mkdir -p public/dbp/v0.2 && rsync -av --delete --exclude='dbp-template.html' --exclude='index.html' --include='*/' --include='*.html' --include='*.ttl' --include='*.jsonld' --include='*.svg' --include='*.png' --exclude='*' resources/dbp/ public/dbp/ && cat > public/dbp/v0.2/index.html << 'EOF' Battery Pass v0.2

Redirecting to Battery Pass vocabulary documentation...

EOF
